title: Custom and dynamic settings view
excerpt:
can I develop a settings view and set it in the monday settings view, or any solve to use dynamic data and fields? 
If I can, How ?

posts.author: yousefShallah (yousef)
posts.cookedHtml:
can I develop a settings view and set it in the monday settings view, or any solve to use dynamic data and fields?
If I can, How ?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @yousefShallah

Are you looking to create a custom board view? If so, you can absolutely set up filters and rules for your board and then save these as a new custom view.

To do this, first select the Filter button in the board header.
You can then set up the rules you’d like the filter to be based on and select save in the top right hand corner of the pop up window:

image1546×668 47.9 KB

You can read more on this here: The Board Filters

We also offer a number of other board views to see data in different ways, such as a timeline, Gantt, Calendar and more.
You can read more about the Board Views here: The board views

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: yousefShallah (yousef)
posts.cookedHtml:
no not exactly what I want.
I need to add custom and dynamic settings for monday app I’m developing it

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @yousefShallah

Thanks so much for coming back to me on this!

This is moderated by our Developer Success Team who will be able to assist you further!
You can find it here: monday Apps & Developers - monday Community Forum

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani
